1637.reason: The error is added to a new Error instance, but the static list 'errors' in the Error class is not being updated correctly. The method addErrors adds the error to the instance's own list, not the static list. This means errors are never stored in the static list, so they will not be output.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [This line incorrectly appends 'ch' again, making the token "&&" or "||" instead of just "&" or "|", and then tries to add it as a valid token which will fail since single '&'/'|' are not in OPERATORS map]

281.reason: [This adds an invalid token to the token stream - single '&' or '|' are not valid operators in the grammar, so they shouldn't be added as tokens with operator types that don't exist in the operator map]
